headline: Assessing Jacobs Solutions (NYSE:J) Valuation After New AI Data Center Digital Twin Launch
summary: Jacobs Solutions (J) has launched a Data Center Digital Twin built on NVIDIA Omniverse DSX blueprints, providing data center developers and owners with a virtual way to plan, test, and optimize gigawatt-scale AI sites. See our latest analysis for Jacobs Solutions. The new digital twin launch comes as Jacobs Solutions' share price has softened recently, with a 1 month share price return of 1.81% decline and a year to date share price return of 3.67% decline. The 3 year total shareholder return...
